message:
feat(harness): add symbol latency baseline and replacement guard test suites

Extend the harness with two new test suites: symbol_latency_baseline_test
validates that core symbol execution stays within latency SLOs, and
replacement_guard_test verifies that replacement-level invariants hold
under concurrent mutation. Shadow_run gains additional differential
comparison paths.

- harness/tests: add symbol_latency_baseline_test.rs for latency SLO
  gate validation
- harness/tests: add replacement_guard_test.rs for concurrent
  replacement-level invariant checking
- harness/tests: expand property_suite_gate_test.rs scenarios
- harness/src: extend shadow_run.rs with new differential paths;
  expand harness binary entry points; update lib.rs exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
